## What changed

Describe the change and why it belongs in Nyxbyte.

## Validation

- [ ] Release build succeeds on Windows.
- [ ] Nyxbyte starts and exits cleanly.
- [ ] Visible changes include a screenshot or short recording when practical.
- [ ] No telemetry or connected behavior was added without explicit opt-in.

## Notes

Mention follow-up work, compatibility concerns, or known limitations.
